title: A Minecraft Movie Hero Pack
description: A port of the free Bedrock Edition Minecraft Movie Skin Pack to Java Edition for use with Legacy Skins.
body:
## It's greatly recommended you just use the latest release of [Modern Skin Packs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-skin-packs) instead, as it's more of an all-in-one solution.

## A Minecraft Movie Hero Pack
[Available for free on Bedrock](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp?id=89967d0c-b75a-4ff8-a603-4683aca4713a), the official Minecraft Movie themed skin pack is coming in HOT for use with [Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins). 

![All 5 skins as seen in Legacy Skins' skin menu.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/x1fU20j7/images/33c33d1739711e54551725b0c7c89ecdf02a6d94.png)
Original textures by Spark Universe.
